name: Fruited Smoked Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Smoked turkey breast, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the almonds on a cookie sheet at 350°F for 5-10 minutes or until golden brown, stirring occasionally.
2. Cook Mostaccioli to desired doneness as directed on the package. Drain and rinse with cold water.
3. In a large bowl, combine all salad ingredients except strawberries and nuts; toss.
4. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine all dressing ingredients; shake well.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad; toss to coat.
6. Cover and refrigerate 1-2 hours to blend flavors, stirring occasionally.
7. Just before serving, gently stir in strawberries and almonds.
